g.onclick: sendPrompt('Deep dive: how does the CEO orchestrator agent work? What model, what memory, how does it decide which department to activate?')
sendPrompt('Deep dive: how does the Market Intelligence agent work? How does it divide the US by region/season/climate, monitor news and economic signals, and score opportunity windows?')
sendPrompt('Deep dive: how does the Lead Targeting agent find and score businesses that are likely to invest in AI automation right now?')
sendPrompt('Deep dive: how does the Outreach agent run personalized automated campaigns across email and LinkedIn at low cost?')
sendPrompt('Deep dive: how does the Nurture and Close agent run automated funnels, follow-up sequences, and CRM updates?')
sendPrompt('Which specific Google APIs are most important? Vertex AI, Gmail API, Sheets, Google Trends, BigQuery?')
sendPrompt('How do we route tasks between Claude Sonnet, Haiku, and Gemini Flash to minimize cost while keeping quality high?')
sendPrompt('How would n8n self-hosted be set up to orchestrate the agentic workflows? What are the key workflow patterns?')
sendPrompt('What is the recommended data schema in Airtable or Supabase for storing regional opportunity scores, leads, and campaign data?')

svg.text: Click any node to go deeper · built for low cost-per-lead
